projects.name: CI/CD Pipeline for a Self-Hosted Resume Site
projects.description: An interactive resume site built as a single-page app, containerized with Docker, and shipped through a Jenkins pipeline that builds the image, pushes it to Docker Hub, and deploys it to Nginx on a self-hosted VM. Kubernetes rollout is the next stage in progress.

projects.name: Phantom Surface
projects.description: Automated attack surface mapping tool built for academic research, with false-positive benchmarking used to evaluate detection accuracy.

projects.name: Family Photo Sharing App
projects.description: A private photo-sharing web app for family use, with local filesystem storage, session-based authentication, and a configurable settings file for easy redeployment.

projects.name: Scalable AWS Infrastructure
projects.description: A console-guided reference build of a scalable VPC, EC2 fleet, Application Load Balancer, and CloudWatch monitoring setup, documented as a step-by-step portfolio guide.
